title: brassica campestris var. biennis
intro: Brassica campestris var. biennis, also known as winter rapeseed or biennial rapeseed, is a biennial plant belonging to the Brassicaceae family, which is a type of cruciferous vegetable. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Brassica campestris var. biennis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including tea, tincture, and oil, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions, including arthritis and digestive issues.
